# Imagined Inventory: analytics-relay

**Project:** tradeguruelectrical
**Created:** 2026-03-14
**Generated by:** `/imagine-inventory`
**Vision:** Hono-based thin relay between iOS app and OpenAI that proxies requests (securing the API key server-side), caches frequent answers, collects analytics per user/region/electrical category/mode, stores response ratings, and provides a company dashboard for usage intelligence.

---

## Instructions

This is a **forward-looking TODO inventory** — none of these items exist yet. It represents every backend route, model, service, middleware, and iOS integration needed to deliver the relay + analytics system.

### How to use this document
- Items are numbered sequentially within each sub-type (restart at 1 per section)
- Status tracks build progress: `todo` → `in-progress` → `done` → `cut` (descoped)
- Run `/imagine-inventory` again to generate additional inventories for new features
- As items get built, update status and add the file path
- Cross-reference with `1-ai-chat-endpoints.md` for the OpenAI API contract this relay forwards

### Document sections
1. **Summary** — Counts per sub-type with status breakdown
2. **Architecture** — How the relay fits between iOS and OpenAI
3. **API Routes** — Every endpoint the relay exposes to the iOS app
4. **Inventory** — Complete itemised file list by sub-type
5. **Dependency Graph** — What blocks what
6. **Build Order** — Recommended implementation sequence
7. **Environment Requirements** — Keys, config, external services needed
8. **StockTake** — Audit trail

### Status definitions
| Status | Meaning |
|--------|---------|
| `todo` | Not started — needs to be built |
| `in-progress` | Currently being worked on |
| `done` | Built and working — file path noted |
| `cut` | Descoped — decided not to build |
| `blocked` | Can't start until dependency is done |

## Architecture

```
┌──────────────┐       ┌───────────────────────┐       ┌──────────────┐
│  iPhone App  │──────▶│  Hono Relay (Edge)     │──────▶│  OpenAI API  │
│  (SwiftUI)   │◀──────│  Cloudflare Workers    │◀──────│              │
└──────────────┘       │  or Fly.io             │       └──────────────┘
                       │                         │
                       │  ┌───────────────────┐  │
                       │  │  D1 / Turso DB    │  │
                       │  │  (SQLite edge)    │  │
                       │  └───────────────────┘  │
                       │                         │
                       │  ┌───────────────────┐  │
                       │  │  KV Cache         │  │
                       │  │  (response cache) │  │
                       │  └───────────────────┘  │
                       └───────────────────────┘
                                │
                       ┌────────▼────────┐
                       │ Admin Dashboard  │
                       │ (Hono + HTML)    │
                       └─────────────────┘
```

**Flow:** App sends chat request → relay authenticates device → checks cache → if miss, forwards to OpenAI with API key → streams response back to app → logs everything to DB → returns.

**Key principle:** The relay is THIN. It does not process or modify AI responses. It forwards, caches, and logs. All intelligence stays in the OpenAI system prompt.

---

## API Routes

### Chat Relay (forwards to OpenAI)

| # | Method | Path | Purpose | Forwards To | Caches | Logs |
|---|--------|------|---------|------------|--------|------|
| 1 | POST | `/v1/chat` | Main chat — stream proxy | OpenAI `/v1/chat/completions` (streaming) | YES (by question hash + mode) | question, mode, tokens, category, latency, region |
| 2 | POST | `/v1/chat/vision` | Photo analysis — stream proxy | OpenAI `/v1/chat/completions` (vision) | NO (unique images) | question, mode, tokens, has_image, category |
| 3 | POST | `/v1/audio/transcribe` | Speech-to-text proxy | OpenAI `/v1/audio/transcriptions` | NO | duration, language, region |
| 4 | POST | `/v1/audio/speech` | Text-to-speech proxy | OpenAI `/v1/audio/speech` | YES (by text hash + voice) | text_length, voice, region |
| 5 | POST | `/v1/files/upload` | File upload proxy | OpenAI `/v1/files` | NO | file_size, mime_type |

### Analytics & Ratings (app → relay)

| # | Method | Path | Purpose | Stores To |
|---|--------|------|---------|----------|
| 6 | POST | `/v1/rating` | User rates an AI response (1-5 stars + optional comment) | `ratings` table |
| 7 | POST | `/v1/feedback` | User flags a response (wrong, unsafe, unhelpful) | `feedback` table |
| 8 | GET | `/v1/device/register` | First launch — assigns anonymous device ID, captures region/locale | `devices` table |

### Admin Dashboard (company-facing)

| # | Method | Path | Purpose | Auth |
|---|--------|------|---------|------|
| 9 | GET | `/admin/dashboard` | HTML dashboard — usage charts, top questions, ratings, costs | Bearer token |
| 10 | GET | `/admin/api/stats` | JSON stats endpoint for dashboard | Bearer token |

| 10 | adminStatsAPI | `backend/src/routes/admin.ts` | todo | GET `/admin/api/stats` — JSON analytics for dashboard charts | StatsService, adminAuth |

### backend-service

| # | Name | File (planned) | Status | Purpose | Depends On |
|---|------|---------------|--------|---------|------------|
| 1 | OpenAIProxy | `backend/src/services/openai-proxy.ts` | todo | Forwards requests to OpenAI, injects API key, streams SSE back. Handles chat, vision, audio, files. Extracts token usage from response. | OPENAI_API_KEY config |
| 2 | CacheService | `backend/src/services/cache.ts` | todo | KV-backed cache. Hashes question + mode → cache key. Checks before forwarding. Stores response on miss. TTL 24h default, configurable per category. Tracks hit counts. | CacheEntry model, KV binding |
| 3 | AnalyticsService | `backend/src/services/analytics.ts` | todo | Logs every request to DB: question, mode, tokens, latency, region, category, cache status. Runs async (non-blocking to response). | ChatLogEntry, DB binding |
| 4 | CategoryClassifier | `backend/src/services/classifier.ts` | todo | Auto-classifies user questions into ElectricalCategory. Uses keyword matching first (fast, free), falls back to GPT-4o-mini classification for ambiguous queries (cheap, async). | ElectricalCategory, CategoryClassification |
| 5 | RatingService | `backend/src/services/rating.ts` | todo | Stores ratings, links to log entries. Calculates running averages per category/mode. | Rating model, DB binding |
| 6 | DeviceService | `backend/src/services/device.ts` | todo | Registers anonymous devices, tracks first/last seen, query counts. Derives region from headers. No PII stored. | Device model, RegionData, DB binding |
| 7 | StatsService | `backend/src/services/stats.ts` | todo | Aggregates analytics for dashboard: top questions, category breakdown, token costs, cache hit rate, ratings distribution, regional usage, hourly/daily trends. | All analytics models, DB binding |

| 6 | `RATE_LIMIT_PER_MIN` | env var | todo | Max requests per device per minute | Default: 60 |
| 7 | `CACHE_TTL_HOURS` | env var | todo | Default cache TTL for responses | Default: 24 |
| 8 | `OPENAI_MODEL` | env var | todo | Default chat model | Default: gpt-4o |

---

## What You Get As a Company

### Per User (anonymous)
- Query count, token spend, cost
- Preferred mode (Fault Find vs Learn vs Research)
- Response rating average
- Flagged response count
- Session frequency, retention signals
- Device type, OS version, app version

### Per Region
- Country/region breakdown of all queries
- Electrical standard usage (AS/NZS vs IEC vs NEC vs BS)
- Regional fault patterns ("solar inverter" queries spike in QLD)
- Time-of-day usage patterns by timezone

### Per Electrical Category
- Auto-classified: wiring, RCD, breaker, earthing, lighting, switchboard, motor, solar, EV charger, compliance, tools, theory
- Top questions per category
- Average rating per category (which categories does the AI handle well vs poorly?)
- Token cost per category (complex fault diagnosis costs more than theory questions)
- Cache hit rate per category (theory questions cache well, unique faults don't)

### Per Response
- Stars (1-5) with optional comment
- Flag reasons (wrong, unsafe, unhelpful)
- Block types returned (did it include warnings? regulation refs? step lists?)
- Token cost of that specific response
- Was it a cache hit?

### Cost Intelligence
- Total spend per day/week/month
- Cost per query average
- Cost per mode
- Cache savings (queries served from cache × average query cost)
- Projected monthly cost at current growth rate

---

## Dependency Graph

| Item | Blocked By | Blocks |
|------|-----------|--------|
| OpenAIProxy | OPENAI_API_KEY | All relay routes |
| CacheService | KV_NAMESPACE, questionHasher | chatRelay, speechRelay |
| AnalyticsService | DB, ChatLogEntry | All relay routes |
| CategoryClassifier | categoryKeywords, ElectricalCategory | AnalyticsService (category field) |
| RatingService (backend) | DB, Rating model | ratingSubmit route |
| DeviceService | DB, Device model | deviceRegister, authMiddleware |
| StatsService | DB, all analytics models | adminDashboard, adminStatsAPI |
| authMiddleware | DeviceService | All `/v1/*` routes |
| adminAuth | ADMIN_TOKEN | Admin routes |
| RelayClient (iOS) | RELAY_URL, DeviceIdentity | Replaces direct OpenAI calls in chat service |
| RatingView (iOS) | RatingService (iOS), RatingRequest | Appears in message bubble |
| All relay routes | authMiddleware, regionDetector | Nothing (leaf nodes) |

## Build Order

### Phase 1 — Backend Foundation (models + DB + config)

| # | Item | Type | Why first |
|---|------|------|-----------|
| 1 | Hono project scaffold | config | `npm create hono@latest backend` — sets up project structure |
| 2 | ElectricalCategory | backend-model | Everything classifies into this |
| 3 | ChatLogEntry | backend-model | Analytics schema — must exist before logging |
| 4 | Rating | backend-model | Rating schema |
| 5 | Feedback | backend-model | Feedback schema |
| 6 | Device | backend-model | Device registration schema |
| 7 | CacheEntry | backend-model | Cache schema |
| 8 | DB migrations | database | Create all 6 tables |
| 9 | RegionData | backend-model | Region extraction shape |
| 10 | TokenUsage / CostBreakdown | backend-model | Cost tracking shapes |

### Phase 2 — Backend Core (middleware + services)

| # | Item | Type | Why now |
|---|------|------|---------|
| 1 | regionDetector | backend-middleware | Needed by all routes for region data |
| 2 | requestLogger | backend-middleware | Debug everything from day 1 |
| 3 | questionHasher | backend-utility | Needed by cache |
| 4 | categoryKeywords | backend-utility | Needed by classifier |
| 5 | costCalculator | backend-utility | Needed by analytics |
| 6 | sseTransformer | backend-utility | Needed by streaming proxy |
| 7 | DeviceService | backend-service | Needed by auth middleware |
| 8 | authMiddleware | backend-middleware | Gates all routes |
| 9 | rateLimiter | backend-middleware | Prevents abuse |
| 10 | OpenAIProxy | backend-service | Core forwarding engine |
| 11 | CacheService | backend-service | Response caching |
| 12 | CategoryClassifier | backend-service | Auto-classification |
| 13 | AnalyticsService | backend-service | Logging engine |

### Phase 3 — Backend Routes

| # | Item | Type | Why now |
|---|------|------|---------|
| 1 | deviceRegister | backend-route | iOS needs this first to get a device_id |
| 2 | chatRelay | backend-route | Core chat proxy — the main route |
| 3 | visionRelay | backend-route | Photo analysis proxy |
| 4 | transcribeRelay | backend-route | Speech-to-text proxy |
| 5 | speechRelay | backend-route | Text-to-speech proxy |
| 6 | fileUploadRelay | backend-route | File upload proxy |
| 7 | ratingSubmit | backend-route | Ratings endpoint |
| 8 | feedbackSubmit | backend-route | Feedback endpoint |
| 9 | RatingService (backend) | backend-service | Stores ratings |

### Phase 4 — iOS Integration

| # | Item | Type | Why now |
|---|------|------|---------|
| 1 | DeviceIdentity | ios-model | Anonymous ID for relay auth |
| 2 | RelayClient | ios-service | Point all API calls at relay instead of OpenAI directly |
| 3 | RatingRequest / FeedbackRequest | ios-model | Request shapes for rating/feedback |
| 4 | RatingService (iOS) | ios-service | Sends ratings to relay |
| 5 | RatingView | ios-view | Star rating UI below AI responses |
| 6 | FeedbackSheet | ios-view | Flag response sheet |

### Phase 5 — Admin Dashboard

| # | Item | Type | Why last |
|---|------|------|---------|
| 1 | StatsService | backend-service | Aggregation queries |
| 2 | adminAuth | backend-middleware | Dashboard security |
| 3 | adminStatsAPI | backend-route | JSON stats endpoint |
| 4 | adminDashboard | backend-route | HTML dashboard page |
| 5 | daily_aggregates cron | database | Nightly rollup job |

## Environment Requirements

| Variable | Required By | Where To Get It | Status |
|----------|------------|-----------------|--------|
| `OPENAI_API_KEY` | OpenAIProxy | https://platform.openai.com/api-keys | have it (.env) |
| `RELAY_URL` | iOS RelayClient | Deployed URL after `wrangler deploy` or `fly deploy` | todo |
| `ADMIN_TOKEN` | adminAuth middleware | `openssl rand -hex 32` | todo |
| `DB_URL` / D1 binding | All DB services | `wrangler d1 create tradeguru-analytics` or Turso dashboard | todo |
| `KV_NAMESPACE` | CacheService | `wrangler kv namespace create RESPONSE_CACHE` | todo |
| `RATE_LIMIT_PER_MIN` | rateLimiter | Config constant, default 60 | todo |
| `CACHE_TTL_HOURS` | CacheService | Config constant, default 24 | todo |
| `OPENAI_MODEL` | OpenAIProxy | Config constant, default `gpt-4o` | todo |

## StockTake

| Date | Action | Total | Todo | Done | Notes |
|------|--------|-------|------|------|-------|
| 2026-03-14 | initial imagination | 61 | 61 | 0 | 10 routes, 14 backend models, 7 services, 5 middleware, 4 utilities, 2 iOS services, 3 iOS models, 2 iOS views, 6 DB tables, 8 config items |
